caption: The video shows a player navigating through the "Ultimate Team" mode in a sports video game, likely Madden NFL. The screen displays the "My Team" section where the player can adjust their lineup. The team has an overall rating of 91, with offensive and defensive ratings also at 91. The top players listed include Jaylen Waddle (WR) and Dexter Lawrence II (DT), both with high ratings. The player is seen interacting with the game interface, possibly making adjustments to their team setup. In the bottom left corner, there is a small inset showing the player's face, indicating that this might be a live stream or recorded gameplay session. The player appears engaged and is likely discussing their strategy or team composition while playing.
